title: Add CarouselCraft AI to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [CarouselCraft AI](https://trdefi.github.io/carouselcraft-ai/) to image
- CarouselCraft AI generates Instagram carousels from a DeFi/Crypto topic using Pollinations.ai for prompt text generation and slide image generation. Users enter a topic to create carousel slides.

Fixes #12152

gist.headline: Slide into DeFi
gist.blurb: CarouselCraft AI just landed in the Greenhouse! This clever new community app uses Pollinations to instantly generate Instagram carousels for DeFi and crypto topics.
gist.summary: Added CarouselCraft AI to the community apps list, a new tool that generates complete Instagram carousels for DeFi and crypto topics using Pollinations for both text and image generation.
gist.impact: Creators can now discover and use CarouselCraft AI to turn simple crypto topics into ready-to-post, multi-slide Instagram decks.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about an app that makes Instagram carousels for Crypto/DeFi. Visual symbols: Instagram-style photo slides/carousels, crypto coins (Bitcoin/Ethereum style pixel coins), the Pollinations bee. The bee could be swiping through glowing pixel-art slides or holding a stack of polaroids with crypto symbols on them.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny director's beret, swiping through a glowing floating carousel of polaroid pictures showing pixelated crypto coins. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny director's beret, swiping through a glowing floating carousel of polaroid pictures showing pixelated crypto coins. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
